<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Traits\BloomFilters; use UnexpectedValueException; trait Expansion { private static $expansionModifier = 'EXPANSION'; public function setArguments(array $arguments) { $argumentsLength = count($arguments); if (static::$expansionArgumentPositionOffset >= $argumentsLength) { parent::setArguments($arguments); return; } if ($arguments[static::$expansionArgumentPositionOffset] === -1) { array_splice($arguments, static::$expansionArgumentPositionOffset, 1, [false]); parent::setArguments($arguments); return; } if ($arguments[static::$expansionArgumentPositionOffset] < 1) { throw new UnexpectedValueException('Wrong expansion argument value or position offset'); } $argument = $arguments[static::$expansionArgumentPositionOffset]; $argumentsBefore = array_slice($arguments, 0, static::$expansionArgumentPositionOffset); $argumentsAfter = array_slice($arguments, static::$expansionArgumentPositionOffset + 1); parent::setArguments(array_merge( $argumentsBefore, [self::$expansionModifier], [$argument], $argumentsAfter )); } }
